description_long: This is a tall, narrow filing cabinet with a dark wooden frame and five vertically stacked drawers. Each drawer features a fabric-textured front panel in a muted beige color, contrasting with the rich brown wood. The drawers are equipped with small, rectangular recessed pull handles at the top center of each panel, allowing for easy access. The cabinet stands on a solid base with a slightly protruding plinth, giving it stability and a classic appearance. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for organizing documents or small items. Its compact footprint makes it ideal for placement in tight spaces such as hallways, offices, or storage rooms.
description: A tall, narrow wooden filing cabinet with five beige fabric-front drawers and recessed pull handles, designed for compact storage. The cabinet features a dark brown frame and a sturdy base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid dark wood frame and the edges of the five beige drawers.
description_view_1: Front view displaying all five drawers with recessed pull handles and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the wood frame and drawer edges.
description_view_3: Alternate front view, nearly identical to view 1, highlighting the drawer arrangement and handles.
